request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2025 Boston incident was stopped because we had the tools to track suspicious activity. Critics say these measures infringe on liberties, but in an uncertain world, we can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityMatters
